# Psalms 88

<!-- BEGIN AUTO-INDEX (verse table + nav; auto-generated — safe to regenerate) -->

↑ [Psalms](../README.md)  ·  [‹ Psalms 87](../Psalms-087/README.md)  ·  [Psalms 89 ›](../Psalms-089/README.md)

📖 **Full text:** [BBE](BBE.md) · [WEB](WEB.md) · [KJV](KJV.md) · [ASV](ASV.md)

## Verses (18)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | O Lord, God of my salvation, I have been crying to you for help by day and by night: | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | Let my prayer come before you; give ear to my cry: | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | For my soul is full of evils, and my life has come near to the underworld. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | I am numbered among those who go down into the earth; I have become like a man for whom there is no help: | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | My soul is among the dead, like those in the underworld, to whom you give no more thought; for they are cut off from your care. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | You have put me in the lowest deep, even in dark places. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | The weight of your wrath is crushing me, all your waves have overcome me. (Selah.) | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | You have sent my friends far away from me; you have made me a disgusting thing in their eyes: I am shut up, and not able to come out. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | My eyes are wasting away because of my trouble: Lord, my cry has gone up to you every day, my hands are stretched out to you. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | Will you do works of wonder for the dead? will the shades come back to give you praise? (Selah.) | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | Will the story of your mercy be given in the house of the dead? will news of your faith come to the place of destruction? | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | May there be knowledge of your wonders in the dark? or of your righteousness where memory is dead? | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | But to you did I send up my cry, O Lord; in the morning my prayer came before you. | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
| [14](BBE.md#v14) | Lord, why have you sent away my soul? why is your face covered from me? | [WEB](WEB.md#v14) · [KJV](KJV.md#v14) · [ASV](ASV.md#v14) |
| [15](BBE.md#v15) | I have been troubled and in fear of death from the time when I was young; your wrath is hard on me, and I have no strength. | [WEB](WEB.md#v15) · [KJV](KJV.md#v15) · [ASV](ASV.md#v15) |
| [16](BBE.md#v16) | The heat of your wrath has gone over me; I am broken by your cruel punishments. | [WEB](WEB.md#v16) · [KJV](KJV.md#v16) · [ASV](ASV.md#v16) |
| [17](BBE.md#v17) | They are round me all the day like water; they have made a circle about me. | [WEB](WEB.md#v17) · [KJV](KJV.md#v17) · [ASV](ASV.md#v17) |
| [18](BBE.md#v18) | You have sent my friends and lovers far from me; I am gone from the memory of those who are dear to me. | [WEB](WEB.md#v18) · [KJV](KJV.md#v18) · [ASV](ASV.md#v18) |
